title: Multi-Account IBKR Agent Architecture (Connection Manager + Decision Agent)
summary: Two layers: (1) Connection Manager — manages multiple ib_insync IB() instances, one per IBKR sub-account, each with unique client ID and port. (2) AccountDecisionAgent — one instance per account, downstream of the 6-agent pipeline. Receives Signal objects, applies per-account config, and routes orders through the correct connection. Foundation for the full multi-account SaaS vision.
approach: Create connection_manager.py with a ConnectionManager class. Holds a dict of account_id -> IB() instance. connect_all() starts each connection with its unique client_id from config. reconnect(account_id) retries with exponential backoff (1s, 2s, 4s, 8s). heartbeat loop pings each connection on 30s interval. On disconnect: triggers reconnect for that account only, other accounts unaffected. Refactor bot.py to use ConnectionManager instead of a single global IB().
